create_worktree: create an isolated git worktree for a sub-agent to modify files without affecting the main branch
cleanup_worktree: remove a git worktree and its branch after the sub-agent finishes work with no uncommitted changes
has_changes_worktree: check if a git worktree has uncommitted changes before cleaning up or merging
list_worktrees: list all managed git worktree directories under the repo's .coder-worktrees folder
merge_back_worktree: merge changes from a sub-agent worktree branch back into the main repository branch
